title: Peer Counseling * Breast Cancer - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Peer Counseling * Breast Cancer 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Breast Cancer Breastfeeding Individuals Perinatal Depression Reproductive Issues Sexual Assault Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details BREAST FRIENDS BREAST CANCER PEER SUPPORT NETWORK AND RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides one-on-one support through diagnosis, treatment, and beyond. Manages a volunteer match program for individuals needing additional support. Hats, wigs, prostheses, and bras are available for chemotherapy-related hair loss and post-mastectomy needs. In-person and phone support available. Offers workshops, retreats, and support groups. 11481 SW Hall Boulevard Suite 105 Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Newly-diagnosed breast cancer patients Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-4pm, Friday by appointment Email (503) 598-8048 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BREAST FRIENDS BREAST CANCER PEER SUPPORT NETWORK AND RESOURCES
